name: MultiSelect
description: Multi-select dropdown widget with search and bulk selection capabilities for IBM Business Automation Workflow

configOptions.name: options
configOptions.label: Options
configOptions.description: Array of available options with value and name properties

configOptions.name: placeholder
configOptions.label: Placeholder
configOptions.description: Placeholder text when no items are selected

configOptions.name: maxSelections
configOptions.label: Max Selections
configOptions.description: Maximum number of items that can be selected (null = no limit)

configOptions.name: showSearch
configOptions.label: Show Search
configOptions.description: Show/hide search input for filtering options

configOptions.name: showActions
configOptions.label: Show Actions
configOptions.description: Show/hide Select All and Clear All buttons

configOptions.name: helperText
configOptions.label: Helper Text
configOptions.description: Helper text displayed below the widget
